title: Lifewit 105L Laundry Basket with Lid, Large Laundry Hamper with Plastic Handles and Removable Bag, Foldable Tall Dirty Clothes Hampers for Laundry for Laundry Room, Bedroom, Bathroom, Dorm, Beige
features: Super Easy to Install: unfold the bag, insert the support rod, attach the hook, put on the inner bag, and you are ready to go; the upgraded slot design makes installation easier then ever
Large Capacity: Measuring 16.9" x 13" x 29.5" (43x33x75cm) with an 105L volume, this laundry hamper with lid easily stores 4-5 loads or a week's clothing, taking up minimal space.

Robust & Stable: Constructed from premium tear-resistant fabric, this dirty clothes hamper includes a plastic frame and four support rods for enhanced stability, supporting up to 16 kg/35 lbs without collapsing or deforming over time

With Lid and Removable Inner Bag: Comes with a detachable inner bag for easy trips to the laundry room, eliminating the need to move the entire hamper; the lid keeps odors and dust contained for a clean environment
Easy to Move: Features finely stitched, tear-resistant handles on both sides, providing a secure grip for convenient transport to bedrooms, bathrooms, laundry rooms, and dorms

Lifewit Laundry Basket with Lid Merchant video Considerate Design for Effortless Carry Removable & Washable Inner Bag The inner bag is very easy to remove and transport to the laundry room without moving the entire hamper. It is also machine washable, providing effortless cleaning, Reinforced Handles for Easy Carry Featuring sturdy handles on both sides with tear-resistant seams, the hamper provides a secure grip for easy movement between bedrooms, bathrooms and laundry rooms. Details We Care Firm Lid The lid design of the basket effectively prevents odors from spreading, ensuring a tidy environment. Stable Structure The four support rods and plastic frame enhance its strength, allowing it to hold up to 26.5 lbs (12 kg) without collapsing or deforming over time. Premium Cationic Cloth The laundry bin is constructed with high-quality and waterproof cationic cloth, which combines lightweight features with impressive sturdiness. Compact Folding When not in use, just take out the poles and fold the hamper flat for compact storage, saving space.
